name: Google Calendar
author: ChuckBuilds
description: Display upcoming events from Google Calendar with date, time, and event details. Shows next 1-3 events with automatic rotation and timezone support.

web_ui_actions.title: Step 2: Authenticate with Google
web_ui_actions.description: Click to generate an authorization link. Visit the link in your browser, authorize access, then paste the code back here.
web_ui_actions.step2_prompt: Paste the authorization code from Google:
